body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35360", "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "The touch utility in uutils coreutils is vulnerable to a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition during file creation. When the utility identifies a missing path, it later attempts creation using File::create(), which internally uses O_TRUNC. An attacker can exploit this window to create a file or swap a symlink at the target path, causing touch to truncate an existing file and leading to permanent data loss.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00104, "percentile": 0.01266}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q6m9-xj2w-xmrc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:30:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6m9-xj2w-xmrc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q6m9-xj2w-xmrc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35360"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35360", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10019", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6m9-xj2w-xmrc"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-30T17:30:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6m9-xj2w-xmrc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
